title: pyrus rufoferruginea var. aromatica
intro: Pyrus rufoferruginea var. aromatica, also known as the Korean mountain pear, is a variety of the Pyrus rufoferruginea species, a deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of Korea and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus rufoferruginea var. aromatica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Pyrus rufoferruginea var. aromatica typically involve the use of its leaves, bark, or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions.
